name: Kerplunk-a-tron Windmill Base
description: A mega integrated facility created by the Sphere of Fleeting Shadow inside the Serenitea Pot, based on the natural scenery of Nod-Krai. Built with a proven metal frame structure and a comprehensive transport network, it radiates a bold, untamed energy that perfectly reflects the design philosophy of the Clink-Clank Krumkake Craftshop. Unlike the Clink-Clank Krumkake Craftshop, however, the base uses far less lighting as zero production takes place here. Still, the windwheels atop the roofs evoke the craftshop's bustling energy, and watching them can fill one with a surge of excitement.
